query:
INSERT INTO `subscription_plans` (`name`, `display_name`, `description`, `price`, `max_videos_per_month`, `max_video_minutes`, `max_characters_per_story`) VALUES
('free', 'Free', 'Free plan - 5 videos per month', 0.00, 5, 5, 5000),
('standard', 'Standard', 'Standard plan - Up to 5 minutes videos', 10.00, NULL, 5, 5000),
('pro', 'Pro', 'Pro plan - Up to 10 minutes videos', 15.00, NULL, 10, 20000),
('premium', 'Premium', 'Premium plan - Unlimited everything', 30.00, NULL, NULL, 30000);
